    E-commerce

    ZimTrade Online Marketplace

    A full-featured e-commerce platform connecting Zimbabwean artisans with global buyers, featuring mobile payment integration and real-time inventory management.

    Next.jsNode.jsMongoDBStripe

    Key Results:

    • • 200% increase in online sales
    • • 5,000+ registered sellers
    • • 30-second average checkout time
    Web App

    Harare Medical Portal

    A patient management and appointment booking system for a leading medical group, with telemedicine capabilities and electronic health records.

    ReactNode.jsPostgreSQLWebRTC

    Key Results:

    • • 50% reduction in no-shows
    • • 1,000+ appointments booked monthly
    • • 98% patient satisfaction

    Adobe CCFigmaNext.jsPhotography

    • • 300% increase in direct bookings
    • • Brand recognition up 150%
    • • Award-winning design
    Custom Software

    Smart Ticketing System

    A custom event ticketing platform with QR code verification, real-time analytics, and multi-venue support for Zimbabwe's entertainment industry.

    ReactNode.jsRedisQR API

    Key Results:

    • • Zero fraud incidents
    • • 50,000+ tickets sold
    • • 15-second average entry time
    Photography

    Professional photography services for a financial institution, including corporate headshots, office interiors, and marketing campaign visuals.

    Canon R5Adobe LightroomCapture One

    Key Results:

    • • 200+ professional photos delivered
    • • Used across 5 marketing campaigns
    • • Consistent brand imagery
    Web App

    Fleet Management Dashboard

    A real-time fleet tracking and management system for a logistics company with GPS integration, driver management, and route optimization.

    ReactPythonPostgreSQLGoogle Maps API

    Key Results:

    • • 30% fuel cost reduction
    • • Real-time tracking of 100+ vehicles
